title: Minimize Result by Adding Parentheses to Expression
titleCn: 向表达式添加括号后的最小结果

testcases.input: expression = "247+38" Output: "2(47+38)" Explanation: The expression evaluates to 2 * (47 + 38) = 2 * 85 = 170. Note that "2(4)7+38" is invalid because the right parenthesis must be to the right of the '+'. It can be shown that 170 is the smallest possible value.
testcases.expectedOutput: "2(47+38)" Explanation: The expression evaluates to 2 * (47 + 38) = 2 * 85 = 170. Note that "2(4)7+38" is invalid because the right parenthesis must be to the right of the '+'. It can be shown that 170 is the smallest possible value.
